visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a black screen and bold white text appearing in the center. (2) A man with short black hair, wearing glasses, a brown patterned flat cap, and a white sweatshirt with red embroidery that says "Banff Alberta" appears in a medium shot. He stands in an outdoor urban setting with green trees and a modern building with curved architecture in the background. He gestures with his hands while speaking. (3) A close-up shot focuses on the interior of a grey plastic bicycle basket. A sticker with multiple icons, a QR code, and a customer service number is visible. A hand with a wooden bead bracelet points at the sticker. (4) The camera returns to the man in the same outdoor setting. He holds his hand to his ear in a telephone gesture, then clenches his fist to emphasize a point. (5) A brief comedic cut shows the man wearing a white beanie instead of his cap, with blue cartoonish tear streaks overlaid on his face, expressing distress. (6) The scene shifts back to the man in his cap, standing near a row of yellow and white bicycles. He holds a white smartphone and interacts with the screen. (7) A close-up screen recording of the smartphone shows the user navigating a mobile application with a white interface and yellow accents. A finger scrolls through a list of text options and taps on a button. (8) The man appears again in a medium close-up, standing behind a tree trunk initially before stepping out to face the camera, continuing his explanation with animated facial expressions and hand movements.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 網路傳說. (2) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 tim 哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. (3) [Subtitle]: 鎖起來以後第二步. (4) [Subtitle]: 你有沒有看到這邊呢. (5) [Subtitle]: 菜籃這裡就有客服專線. (6) [Subtitle]: 撥打客服專線. (7) [Subtitle]: 跟客服人員說你的情形. (8) [Subtitle]: 說明完成以後. (9) [Subtitle]: 他們就會有派人. (10) [Subtitle]: 過來幫你處理車子. (11) [Subtitle]: 但是計費是從他幫你把車還為止喔. (12) [Subtitle]: 要特別注意一下. (13) [Variety]: 什麼!? Youbike 站滿了!. (14) [Subtitle]: 沒位置停嗎 我教你該怎麼辦. (15) [Subtitle]: 很簡單. (16) [Subtitle]: 打開 Youbike App. (17) [Subtitle]: 左上角三條線點下去以後. (18) [Subtitle]: 往下滑有個無位可還. (19) [Subtitle]: 點下去以後. (20) [Subtitle]: 再按申請滿站增時. (21) [Subtitle]: 它可以有15分鐘. (22) [Subtitle]: 這15分鐘你可以. (23) [Subtitle]: 騎到周邊的站點去還車. (24) [Subtitle]: 或者是在原地等待空位. (25) [Subtitle]: 但. (26) [Subtitle]: 如果你都沒有辦法. (27) [Subtitle]: 還有一招. (28) [Subtitle]: 網路傳說.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a brown and tan patterned flat cap, and a white long-sleeved sweatshirt with red cursive text 'Banff' on the chest. He wears a wooden bead bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor urban area featuring a paved sidewalk, green deciduous trees, and a large modern white building with horizontal architectural lines in the background. A row of yellow and white shared bicycles (YouBike) is docked nearby.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with an upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM and a male narrator speaking with a clear, enthusiastic tone. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies the visual transition to the close-up of the bicycle basket. (3) The narrator continues explaining a step-by-step process with a high speech rate and confident delivery. (4) A comical 'crying' sound effect or distorted vocal filter is heard during the brief scene with the beanie, followed by a 'ding' sound indicating a tip or alert. (5) As the narrator guides the listener through an app interface, subtle digital UI sound effects like soft clicks are interspersed with the speech. (6) The BGM maintains a steady, energetic pulse throughout the entire duration, providing a consistent backdrop to the fast-paced instructional narration.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem -> Solution 1 (Manual) -> Transition -> Solution 2 (App) -> Teaser.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick and helpful guide for YouBike users in Taiwan, specifically addressing the problem of encountering a station that is already full when trying to return a bike. It educates viewers on using the official app's 'full station extension' feature and contacting customer service.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides helpful information about a public service (YouBike) rather than promoting a paid product/service for commercial gain.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of text overlays and fast-paced editing typical of social media shorts (TikTok/Reels style) to keep the viewer engaged during a tutorial.
